query: How does LOOKUP-XREF perform cross-reference lookups?

results.name: READXREF Header
4000-EXPORT-XREFS
results.preamble:
File: CBEXPORT.cbl
Program: CBEXPORT
Paragraph: 4000-EXPORT-XREFS (lines 376-390)
References: COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVEXPORT
Calls: PERFORM 4100-READ-XREF-RECORD, PERFORM 4200-CREATE-XREF-EXPORT-RECORD
results.summary: paragraph 4000-EXPORT-XREFS in CBEXPORT.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCUS01Y, CVACT01Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA05Y.... invokes: PERFORM 4100-READ-XREF-RECORD, PERFORM 4200-CREATE-XREF-EXPORT-RECORD.
results.content:
4000-EXPORT-XREFS.
      *****************************************************************
           DISPLAY 'CBEXPORT: Processing cross-reference records'
           
           PERFORM 4100-READ-XREF-RECORD
           
           PERFORM UNTIL WS-XREF-EOF
               PERFORM 4200-CREATE-XREF-EXPORT-RECORD
               PERFORM 4100-READ-XREF-RECORD
           END-PERFORM
           
           DISPLAY 'CBEXPORT: Cross-references exported: ' 
                   WS-XREF-RECORDS-EXPORTED.

      *****************************************************************

results.name: 1000-XREFFILE-GET-NEXT
results.preamble:
File: CBACT03C.cbl
Program: CBACT03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Read and print account cross reference data file.
Paragraph: 1000-XREFFILE-GET-NEXT (lines 92-117)
References: COPY CVACT03Y
Calls: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 1000-XREFFILE-GET-NEXT in CBACT03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT03Y. invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: I/O ROUTINES TO ACCESS A KSDS, VSAM DATA SET...               *.
results.content:
1000-XREFFILE-GET-NEXT.                                                  
           READ XREFFILE-FILE INTO CARD-XREF-RECORD.                            
           IF  XREFFILE-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
               DISPLAY CARD-XREF-RECORD                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               IF  XREFFILE-STATUS = '10'                                       
                   MOVE 16 TO APPL-RESULT                                       
               ELSE                                                             
                   MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                       
               END-IF                                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               IF  APPL-EOF                                                     
                   MOVE 'Y' TO END-OF-FILE                                      
               ELSE                                                             
                   DISPLAY 'ERROR READING XREFFILE'                             
                   MOVE XREFFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                            
                   PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                               
                   PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                   
               END-IF                                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*
results.comments: I/O ROUTINES TO ACCESS A KSDS, VSAM DATA SET...               *

results.name: 2000-LOOKUP-XREF
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN01C.cbl
Program: CBTRN01C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 2000-LOOKUP-XREF (lines 227-240)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA05Y
results.summary: paragraph 2000-LOOKUP-XREF in CBTRN01C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVCUS01Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT02Y.... comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
2000-LOOKUP-XREF.
           MOVE XREF-CARD-NUM TO FD-XREF-CARD-NUM
           READ XREF-FILE  RECORD INTO CARD-XREF-RECORD
           KEY IS FD-XREF-CARD-NUM
                INVALID KEY
                  DISPLAY 'INVALID CARD NUMBER FOR XREF'
                  MOVE 4 TO WS-XREF-READ-STATUS
                NOT INVALID KEY
                  DISPLAY 'SUCCESSFUL READ OF XREF'
                  DISPLAY 'CARD NUMBER: ' XREF-CARD-NUM
                  DISPLAY 'ACCOUNT ID : ' XREF-ACCT-ID
                  DISPLAY 'CUSTOMER ID: ' XREF-CUST-ID
           END-READ.
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 0000-XREFFILE-OPEN
results.preamble:
File: CBACT03C.cbl
Program: CBACT03C - BATCH COBOL Program - Read and print account cross reference data file.
Paragraph: 0000-XREFFILE-OPEN (lines 118-135)
References: COPY CVACT03Y

results.summary: paragraph 0000-XREFFILE-OPEN in CBACT03C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVACT03Y. invokes: PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS, PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM. comment hint: ---------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
0000-XREFFILE-OPEN.                                                      
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           OPEN INPUT XREFFILE-FILE                                             
           IF  XREFFILE-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING XREFFILE'                                 
               MOVE XREFFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.content:
0100-XREFFILE-OPEN.                                                      
           MOVE 8 TO APPL-RESULT.                                               
           OPEN INPUT XREF-FILE                                                 
           IF  XREFFILE-STATUS = '00'                                           
               MOVE 0 TO APPL-RESULT                                            
           ELSE                                                                 
               MOVE 12 TO APPL-RESULT                                           
           END-IF                                                               
           IF  APPL-AOK                                                         
               CONTINUE                                                         
           ELSE                                                                 
               DISPLAY 'ERROR OPENING CROSS REF FILE'   XREFFILE-STATUS         
               MOVE XREFFILE-STATUS TO IO-STATUS                                
               PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                   
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                       
           END-IF                                                               
           EXIT.                                                                
      *---------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: 1500-A-LOOKUP-XREF
results.preamble:
File: CBTRN02C.cbl
Program: CBTRN02C - BATCH COBOL Program - Post the records from daily transaction file.
Paragraph: 1500-A-LOOKUP-XREF (lines 380-392)
References: COPY CVTRA06Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVTRA01Y
results.summary: paragraph 1500-A-LOOKUP-XREF in CBTRN02C.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVTRA06Y, CVTRA05Y, CVACT03Y, CVACT01Y....
results.content:
1500-A-LOOKUP-XREF.                                                      
      *    DISPLAY 'CARD NUMBER: ' DALYTRAN-CARD-NUM                            
           MOVE DALYTRAN-CARD-NUM TO FD-XREF-CARD-NUM                           
           READ XREF-FILE INTO CARD-XREF-RECORD                                 
              INVALID KEY                                                       
                MOVE 100 TO WS-VALIDATION-FAIL-REASON                           
                MOVE 'INVALID CARD NUMBER FOUND'                                
                  TO WS-VALIDATION-FAIL-REASON-DESC                             
              NOT INVALID KEY                                                   
      *           DISPLAY 'ACCOUNT RECORD FOUND'                                
                  CONTINUE                                                      
           END-READ                                                             
           EXIT.

results.preamble:

Paragraph: 4100-READ-XREF-RECORD (lines 391-401)

results.summary: paragraph 4100-READ-XREF-RECORD in CBEXPORT.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCUS01Y, CVACT01Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA05Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM.
results.content:
4100-READ-XREF-RECORD.
      *****************************************************************
           READ XREF-INPUT
           
           IF NOT WS-XREF-OK AND NOT WS-XREF-EOF
               DISPLAY 'ERROR: Reading XREF-INPUT, Status: '
                       WS-XREF-STATUS
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF.

      *****************************************************************

1500-A-LOOKUP-XREF.                                                      
           READ XREF-FILE INTO CARD-XREF-RECORD                                 
              INVALID KEY                                                       
                 DISPLAY 'INVALID CARD NUMBER : '  FD-XREF-CARD-NUM             
                 MOVE 23 TO IO-STATUS                                           
                 PERFORM 9910-DISPLAY-IO-STATUS                                 
                 PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM                                     
           END-READ

results.name: 4200-CREATE-XREF-EXPORT-RECORD
results.preamble:
File: CBEXPORT.cbl
Program: CBEXPORT
Paragraph: 4200-CREATE-XREF-EXPORT-RECORD (lines 402-430)
References: COPY CVCUS01Y, COPY CVACT01Y, COPY CVACT03Y, COPY CVTRA05Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVEXPORT
Calls: PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
results.summary: paragraph 4200-CREATE-XREF-EXPORT-RECORD in CBEXPORT.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCUS01Y, CVACT01Y, CVACT03Y, CVTRA05Y.... invokes: PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM.
results.content:
4200-CREATE-XREF-EXPORT-RECORD.
      *****************************************************************
           INITIALIZE EXPORT-RECORD
           
      *    Set record type and common fields
           MOVE 'X' TO EXPORT-REC-TYPE
           MOVE WS-FORMATTED-TIMESTAMP TO EXPORT-TIMESTAMP
           ADD 1 TO WS-SEQUENCE-COUNTER
           MOVE WS-SEQUENCE-COUNTER TO EXPORT-SEQUENCE-NUM
           MOVE '0001' TO EXPORT-BRANCH-ID
           MOVE 'NORTH' TO EXPORT-REGION-CODE
           
      *    Map xref fields to export record
           MOVE XREF-CARD-NUM TO EXP-XREF-CARD-NUM
           MOVE XREF-CUST-ID TO EXP-XREF-CUST-ID
           MOVE XREF-ACCT-ID TO EXP-XREF-ACCT-ID
           
           WRITE EXPORT-OUTPUT-RECORD FROM EXPORT-RECORD
           
           IF NOT WS-EXPORT-OK
               DISPLAY 'ERROR: Writing export record, Status: '
                       WS-EXPORT-STATUS
               PERFORM 9999-ABEND-PROGRAM
           END-IF
           
           ADD 1 TO WS-XREF-RECORDS-EXPORTED
           ADD 1 TO WS-TOTAL-RECORDS-EXPORTED.

      *****************************************************************
